title: Process to make local drives available by default while using mRemoteng utility to remote desktop into Win Servers
author: ee1242
body_snippet:
<!--- Provide a general summary of the issue in the Title above -->

My organization uses the mRemoteng utility to remote destkop into Windows servers.

The homepage for this utility is https://mremoteng.org/.

The drives on the computer that is using the mRemoteng computer can be made available within the Remote Desktop session on the Windows servers or workstations that are being remote desktopped into by navigating to the Config section, selecting Disk Drives, and changing this option t...

iterations.description: The user is reporting that local drives are not available by default for RDP connections, despite the codebase indicating 'Local' as the default setting for 'RedirectDiskDrives'. This suggests either a bug where the default is not being applied or a need for an explicit user-facing mechanism to enforce this default.

comments.author: Kvarkas
comments.snippet: that will be available in next release with user/connection profiles

comments.author: ee1242
comments.snippet:
What is the expected date for the next release of mRemoteng?

I wasn't aware that this program was still being updated.

comments.author: Kvarkas
comments.snippet:
I am new maintainer, but mostly working alone so its depends... current build in development 1.77.3, from the page you may see nb release as well (https://mremoteng.org/download) currently reorganizing settings blocks to be able implement rbac, hoping release nb this weekend but it will be more for test that for work.
However may fit your needs, also thinking to implement attributes then with run you may override default settings e.g. mremoteng.exe /RedirectDiskDrives=true but not yet started (...

comments.author: LIyoai
comments.snippet: Why not just use the default settings + inheritance? This feature is already available in all versions.

comments.author: ee1242
comments.snippet: What are the exact steps to do what you have described?

comments.snippet:

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available for testing**

A fix for this issue has been implemented in our community fork (`robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`). A beta build including this fix is available from the fork's Releases page.

Please test and report if this resolves your issue.

---

> *We sincerely appreciate the mRemoteNG maintainers and the wonderful community that has kept this project alive and thriving for over a decade. Your work powers thousands of IT professionals worldwide, including us. Our fork ...

notes:
AI triage (gemini): The user is reporting that local drives are not available by default for RDP connections, despite the codebase indicating 'Local' as the default setting for 'RedirectDiskDrives'. This suggests either a bug where the default is not being applied or a need for an explicit user-facing mechanism to enforce this default.
Approach: Investigate why the 'Local' default for 'RedirectDiskDrives' might not be taking effect for new connections. This could involve examining the connection creation logic and how default settings are loaded. Depending on the root cause, the solution may involve modifying connection initialization, adding a global option in the settings UI to ensure this default, or improving how user-specific settings interact with application defaults.
